label: Transparent Fruit Bat motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on flat #00ff00 chroma key, then local remove_chroma_key.py alpha extraction with border auto-key, soft matte, and despill.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fruit Bat transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated fruit bat face motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single expressive fruit bat face and upper head, front-facing with slight three-quarter depth, accurate mammal anatomy, large amber eyes, glossy black wing-like ear silhouettes framing the face, soft dark charcoal-brown fur, warm muzzle highlights, subtle fig-purple nose and throat shadow, delicate tropical canopy warmth reflected in the eyes. The expression should be alert, intelligent, charismatic, and suitable as the core motif for an expressive media system.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the whole face, ears, and wing-like dark ear forms without cropping; one bat only.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves fur texture, amber-eye reflections, black wing/ear silhouette detail, crisp edge separation, and tactile mammal character.
Transparent workflow: place the bat on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the bat fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the bat.
Constraints: no body, no full wingspan, no branch, no fruit, no leaves, no tropical background, no second animal, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-fruit-bat/design-system-light.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Fruit Bat" / "Fruit Bat", an expressive media system derived from the visible fruit bat face motif. The board is the implementation reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Reference use: Use the visible fruit bat cutout in this conversation as the source of truth. Extract palette, membrane texture rhythm, amber eye glow, fig-purple muzzle accents, black wing/ear silhouettes, tropical canopy warmth, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif image. The board must visibly respect the motif colors: black wing, amber eye, fig purple, warm tawny fur, charcoal, canopy green shadows, and soft cream highlight.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, clean grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Fruit Bat, Fruit Bat, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use expressive editorial/media UI type hierarchy with clear numeric rhythm.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, media queue cards, story preview tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: warm canopy-cream page background, pale fig cards, amber primary actions, black wing membrane borders, fig-purple accents, charcoal text, canopy green muted states, bat-ear notch shapes used subtly in navigation tabs, fine membrane-vein texture, 8px radii, expressive but usable media-system dashboard layout.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Fruit Bat".
Constraints: do not include a full bat body, do not include scary horror imagery, no cave scene, no random fruit photos, no repeated bat clutter, no neon overload, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Fruit Bat".

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-fruit-bat/design-system-dark.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Fruit Bat" / "Fruit Bat". It must feel like the same system translated from the visible light-mode Morphous Fruit Bat board and the same fruit bat face motif, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent fruit bat motif and visible light board in this conversation as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, membrane texture rhythm, amber eye glow, fig-purple accents, black wing/ear silhouette language, expressive media dashboard layout, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. Translate canopy-cream surfaces into deep black-wing and charcoal canopy surfaces, with cream foreground text, luminous amber primary, fig-purple accents, muted canopy green states, and restrained tawny highlights.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, clean grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Fruit Bat, Fruit Bat, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use expressive editorial/media UI type hierarchy with clear numeric rhythm.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, media queue cards, story preview tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: deep bat-black background, charcoal cards with subtle membrane-vein edge texture, amber primary actions and chart lines, fig-purple badges and focus states, cream text, canopy green success states, tawny fur highlight dividers, bat-ear notch shapes used subtly in navigation tabs, 8px radii, expressive but usable dark media-system dashboard layout.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Fruit Bat".
Constraints: do not include a full bat body, do not include scary horror imagery, no cave scene, no random fruit photos, no repeated bat clutter, no neon overload, no flat pure-black-only background, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Fruit Bat".
